scoring_formula.formula_text: Any Best 5 Subjects (with programme-specific subject weightings)
scoring_formula.notes: PolyU applies programme-specific weightings (multipliers from 10-50x) resulting in scores in the 100-350 range. See polyu.edu.hk for details.

2025.note: PolyU scores are weighted (scale factor applied); not directly comparable to other universities
